task: Add the GTM-KGGFK4KW container across ResearchOps public and application pages.
precedenceDecisions: GitHub Diamond required a separate approved feature branch because the starting worktree contained unrelated uncommitted changes.
ResearchOps Developer Control required the generated Nunjucks source and committed public HTML to remain in sync.
Multi-Functional Team privacy controls required the missing consent and data-protection review to be recorded as an escalated high residual risk.
GOV.UK Design System affected only the shared HTML delivery surface; no visible component or interaction was changed.
Mural Public API was selected only by the operating-model keyword fallback for 'tag'; no Mural API capability was used or changed.
filesRead: AGENTS.md and the required .agent-operating-model control files
selected bundle prompt specifications and bodies
filesModified: public/index.html and the 64 registered public/pages HTML outputs

validation.result: passed; regenerated deployable public and application pages
passed; verifies exactly one GTM loader in the head and one noscript fallback after body start on every deployable page
passed after merging origin/main; both GTM and Flux coverage remain intact

issues: The isolated worktree initially lacked installed dependencies; npm ci resolved the missing nunjucks package before validation.
No consent mechanism or privacy-review artefact exists for unconditional analytics across authenticated research pages; this is recorded as a high residual risk requiring escalation.

origin/main added Flux analytics at the same shared head and body insertion points. The merge retains Flux's module and page metadata, restores the GTM snippets, and regenerates all static pages from the combined sources.
residualRisks: Only the GTM container bootstrap is committed. Actual Google Analytics tags, retention and event configuration remain controlled in GTM and need privacy approval before non-essential analytics are enabled.

mergeResolution.strategy: Merged without rewriting published branch history.
mergeResolution.outcome: Retained Flux integration and GTM integration in the shared layout, static page normaliser, governance registers and generated HTML.
